Blog

Notes on AI-native engineering, tech leadership, and the consulting bridge.

I write occasionally about what I'm building, what I've learned, and where engineering craft is heading. First posts arriving soon.

Topics I'm planning

  • How I use Claude end-to-end

    The orchestration setup behind a year of daily Claude-driven engineering — specs, code, tests, review, all on one pipeline.

  • R&D leadership is not engineering management

    Why leading a small team toward something new requires different reflexes from running a steady-state engineering org.

  • What consulting taught me about engineering communication

    Three years embedded in a management-consulting team rewired how I write, speak, and frame technical decisions.

  • From physics simulations to LLM pipelines

    The unbroken thread from accelerator instrumentation at CERN to nationwide legal-data pipelines — and what each chapter taught me.

Want to know when I post?

RSS feed coming with the first published post. In the meantime, the easiest way to stay in touch is a short conversation.
